payload.name: CoreWeave, Inc.
payload.narrative:
CoreWeave, Inc. (CRWV) is an AI-native cloud infrastructure provider headquartered in New Jersey, operating purpose-built GPU data centers across the US and Europe with a most-favored-nation supply relationship with Nvidia. The company reported $2.08B in Q1 2026 revenue (up 112% YoY) and held a $99.4B revenue backlog as of March 31, 2026, anchored by multi-year contracts with Meta ($21B) and OpenAI (~$22.4B in cumulative commitments). It is on the watchlist as a concentrated play on AI compute demand, with the key open question being whether its high capital intensity — approximately $2.60 spent for every dollar of revenue — can translate into sustainable free cash flow as contracted revenue ramps.

Note: Revenue backlog and capital intensity figures sourced from Sacra estimates (sacra.com/c/coreweave); Q1 2026 results and contract values cross-verified against multiple secondary sources. Company background confirmed via Wikipedia and CoreWeave's own investor communications. These are publicly reported or estimated figures, not independently audited by this research workspace. WATCHLIST_ONLY — no position, no recommendation.
catalysts: Quarterly earnings and forward guidance cadence
Sector-specific demand cycle and supply-chain signals
Macro regime shifts affecting risk appetite
